audit_items.proof_trace: The staleness check at L162 (`report.observationsTimestamp < block.timestamp - feedInfo.stalenessThreshold => revert StaleFeedData()`) directly implements the property assertion. The check runs on every iteration of the second loop (L155–182) with no skip or bypass path, and `stalenessThreshold` is guaranteed non-zero by `_applyFeedInfoUpdates` (L244). No code path in `transmit` stores a price without passing this check.
